_status: experimental — Antigravity 2.0 (launched 19 May 2026) has not yet published an open plugin manifest spec. This file mirrors the Gemini CLI Extensions format that Antigravity's `agy plugin import gemini` converter accepts. If you're on Antigravity CLI, the most reliable install path today is to first add the plugin as a Gemini CLI extension (or use the `agy plugin import` path); when Antigravity publishes a v2-native plugin manifest spec, this file will be updated to match. See docs/cross-platform-install.md for the current install workflow.
name: digital-marketing-pro
description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology — 150 portable Agent Skills, 12-Part Strategy Flow, EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, 6-platform AEO/GEO including Google AI Mode.
